title: PhysiClaw docs configuration
description: Doc-owned configuration for the PhysiClaw docs site. Lives with the content and is read by the renderer's astro.config at build time.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema, for editor validation.

sidebar.description: Top-level sidebar sections, in display order. Each section lists its pages explicitly, which also sets their order.

label.description: Section label in the default locale (en).

translations.description: Per-locale label overrides, keyed by BCP-47 tag (e.g. "zh-CN").

items.description: Pages in this section, in order. Each entry is a page slug relative to the docs root — e.g. "start/introduction" — with no locale prefix and no file extension. The page's own title is used as its label.
A page slug: lowercase path segments separated by '/', no leading slash, no .md/.mdx extension.
